secrets: owes the victim a debt that was about to come due
was secretly meeting someone the victim would have disapproved of
had already been dismissed from the victim's employ, quietly, that week
forged a signature on a document the victim had not yet noticed
had been overheard threatening the victim two nights before
was not who they claimed to be introduced as tonight
had taken something from the victim's study earlier in the evening
had a prior conviction the rest of the room does not know about
was about to be named in the victim's amended will, for reasons no one else could explain
had lied about where they were the previous week, and the victim had found out

an old friend drifting into quiet resentment
a former lover the victim had never fully let go
a relative with a long-standing grievance about money
a rival the victim had publicly humiliated
an employee the victim treated as beneath notice
